ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic activity */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the economic activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the activity is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_activities_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sectors) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sector is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_rates" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP rate */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic activity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the GDP rate was recorded */,
  "gdp_rate" REAL /* GDP rate for the economic activity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP data */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the GDP rate is estimated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the GDP rate was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the GDP rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_rates" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment rate */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic activity */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the employment rate was recorded */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the economic activity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the employment data */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the employment rate is estimated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the employment rate was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the employment rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the year is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the year was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic activity */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GDP rate */,
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment rate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dataset is public */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES economic_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_employment_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_id") REFERENCES employment_rates ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_gdp_id FOREIGN KEY ("gdp_id") REFERENCES gdp_rates ("gdp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., economist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata for the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_activity" (
  "sector_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector-activity relationship */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_activity_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES economic_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_activity_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is public */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
